subcodes.first_line: The remembrance proceeding from Our presence unto all who are on earth, that this remembrance may draw them nigh unto the One Who is remembered and give them glad-tidings of God's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن علی الارض لیقربهم الذکر الی المذکور و یبشرهم بعنایة الله
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @transcendence; unknowability of God
